name: tuliprox
longDescription:
tuliprox is a high-performance IPTV proxy and playlist processor written in Rust. It ingests M3U/M3U8, Xtream Codes, and local media sources, then reshapes, filters, and merges them into clean EPG-tagged output for Plex, Jellyfin, Emby, and Kodi clients.

Features include stream transcoding, content filtering and rewriting, EPG generation, a web UI for configuration, and multi-source aggregation. Configured via YAML files editable through the web interface.
description: A high-performance IPTV proxy and playlist processor for Plex, Jellyfin, Emby, and Kodi.
